completedWork: Series Circuit Analysis Simulation - NEW: Interactive series circuit simulation with multiple resistors, real-time voltage drop visualization, and comprehensive analysis. Features: Dynamic resistor configuration (2-6 resistors), individual resistance adjustment (1Ω to 100kΩ), source voltage control (0.1-100V). Real-time calculations: Total resistance (sum of all resistors), circuit current (I = V/R_total), voltage drop across each resistor (V_n = I × R_n), power dissipation per resistor (P_n = I² × R_n), total power (P_total = V × I), voltage distribution percentages. Visual feedback: Interactive SVG circuit diagram with animated current flow, voltage drop bar charts with percentage indicators, power distribution visualization, color-coded voltage levels, comprehensive results display. Quick presets: Voltage Divider (12V, 3 resistors), LED Circuit (5V, low resistance), High Resistance (24V), Low Resistance (12V). Educational content: Series circuit rules (same current, additive resistance, voltage division, power distribution), Ohm's Law applications, Kirchhoff's Voltage Law, practical applications (voltage dividers, LED circuits, sensor arrays). File: pages/simulations/series-circuit-analysis.vue

Transformer Regulation Calculator - NEW: Calculate transformer voltage regulation, efficiency, and performance parameters. Features: Primary/secondary voltage input (1V-15kV), winding parameters (resistance and reactance for primary/secondary), core loss input (0.1W-500W), load configuration (current: 0.1-200A, power factor: 0.1-1.0, load type selection). Real-time calculations: Turns ratio, equivalent impedance (referred to primary), voltage regulation percentage, no-load and full-load voltages, efficiency (output/input power), copper loss (I²R), core loss, total loss, regulation vs load curve, efficiency vs load curve. Visual feedback: Equivalent circuit diagram (primary, transformer symbol, secondary referred to primary), regulation curve graph showing regulation vs load percentage, efficiency curve graph, loss breakdown chart (core vs copper loss), impedance triangle visualization. Quick presets: Distribution Transformer (11kV/400V), Power Transformer (230V/24V), Instrument Transformer (230V/12V), Auto Transformer (230V/115V). Educational content: Voltage regulation definition and formula, efficiency calculation, loss components (core loss constant, copper loss varies with load), equivalent circuit theory, impedance transformation, design tips (good regulation <3%, high efficiency >95%). File: pages/calculators/transformer-regulation.vue
latestCommit: feat: add Series Circuit Analysis simulation and Transformer Regulation calculator
buildStatus: Complete - Successfully created and integrated two new features: Series Circuit Analysis simulation (pages/simulations/series-circuit-analysis.vue) with dynamic resistor configuration, real-time voltage drop analysis, power distribution visualization, and comprehensive educational content; Transformer Regulation Calculator (pages/calculators/transformer-regulation.vue) with voltage regulation calculations, efficiency curves, loss breakdown analysis, equivalent circuit visualization, and multiple transformer presets. Both features include interactive SVG diagrams, real-time computations, and detailed explanations. Updated calculators index to include the new Transformer Regulation Calculator. Changes committed and pushed to GitHub (commit 6ec711e).
